items.title: Trump denies being 'desperate' for a deal, singles out Australia as 'not great' over Hormuz

items.summary: Elliot was assigned female at birth but came out as trans at age 15. Before then, he felt like he was constantly in gender limbo.

items.summary: Australia's rental market remains tight, with low vacancy rates and rising rents, despite modest improvements.
